items.claim: Abdul Hussein has nine submissions and five knockouts as a finisher.
Abdul Hussein has a speed edge over Cody Gibson on the feet.
items.quote: striking wise, little bit of that speed edge over the Cody Gibson side.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein holds a violent knockout win over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam.
items.quote: he has a win over former UFC fighter Tyson Nam. And it wasn't just a win. It was a violent knockout. Badly starched him.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is pretty big for the weight class at 5 foot 10 with a 71 inch reach.
items.quote: 5 foot 10, 71 in reach. These are strong advantages to have in the bantamweight division.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and on a two-fight losing streak.
items.quote: lost two in a row 38 years old kind of in that final phase

items.claim: Cody Gibson could give Hussein trouble in the early moments by coming out hard and fast, pressing him up against the cage.
items.quote: I think Gibson in the early moments could give Hussein a little bit of trouble. I mean, Cody Gibson round one against Dean Blackshere came out like a bat out of hell. And there's a possibility he tries to do something like that here.
